prepositions_phrasal_verbs_prepositions_.name: prepositions phrasal verbs prepositions of place all levels

questions.question: Choose the place preposition: She is {a1} the kitchen.
Choose the inside-space preposition: The keys are {a1} the box.
Choose the surface preposition: The picture is {a1} the wall.
Choose the point-location preposition: I will meet you {a1} the station.
Choose the position: The cat is {a1} the table.
Choose the near-position phrase: The bank is {a1} the post office.
Choose the preposition for two things: The school is {a1} the park and the library.
Choose the position: The car is parked {a1} the house.
Choose the opposite-position phrase: The cafe is {a1} the cinema.
Choose the fixed expression: Dad is {a1} work now.
Avoid the mistake: She is {a1} home today.
Choose the transport pattern: We are {a1} the bus.
